creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
ahci(4) driver has quirks that should allow forcing 1, 2 or 4 ports.  I could add one more to force 6.  Or alike to Linux add tunable to specify implemented ports mask.  Other than that I don't see a problem in driver operation.  It seems like a hardware issue.

Does it cause you any problems?  VMware virtual AHCI also reports 32 SATA ports and nobody cares about it.  Adding tunable or workaround to address cosmetic issue sounds almost like a waste of time to me.
